title: Rlsurvival
description: Fabric survival modpack focused on seasons, temperature and thirst.
body:
RLsurvival is a Fabric survival modpack inspired by real-life conditions and environmental gameplay.

The pack focuses on immersion and survival mechanics such as changing seasons, temperature and thirst, while keeping the experience balanced and accessible.

❄ Dynamic seasons and weather that affect gameplay
💧 Thirst and body temperature mechanics
🌍 Improved world generation and exploration
🎮 Optimized for shaders and smooth performance on modern versions

RLsurvival is about adapting to the environment, planning ahead, and surviving the world itself rather than just fighting mobs.
